channel.title: army.mil News (sample)
channel.description: Sample army.mil feed for offline scraper testing.

item.title: Army fields AI-enabled counter-drone system to forward units
item.description: The Army has fielded an artificial intelligence counter-unmanned aircraft system to deployed units.

item.title: Soldiers test autonomous resupply vehicle in field evaluation
item.description: An autonomous ground resupply vehicle underwent operational test and evaluation at a training center.

item.title: Army band performs at Independence Day parade
item.description: The Army band entertained families at the annual Independence Day celebration.
